data.name: INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
data.value: An unexpected error occurred.

data.name: VALIDATION_ERROR
data.value: Request validation failed.

data.name: INVALID_CREDENTIALS
data.value: Username or password is incorrect.

data.name: SESSION_ALREADY_ACTIVE
data.value: This account is already active on another device. Log out there or ask an administrator to revoke the session.

data.name: INVALID_ADMIN_SESSION
data.value: Your admin session is no longer active. Please sign in again.

data.name: ADMIN_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: Admin id is required.

data.name: ADMIN_STATUS_INVALID
data.value: Admin status is invalid.

data.name: ADMIN_USER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Admin user does not exist.

data.name: CUSTOMER_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: Customer id is required.

data.name: CUSTOMER_USER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Customer user does not exist.

data.name: EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Email already exists.

data.name: PHONE_NUMBER_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Phone number already exists.

data.name: USERNAME_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Username already exists.

data.name: ROLE_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: Role id is required.

data.name: ROLE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Role does not exist.

data.name: ROLE_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Role name already exists.

data.name: ROLE_PERMISSION_ALREADY_GRANTED
data.value: This role already has the permission.

data.name: ROLE_PERMISSION_DUPLICATED
data.value: Role permission ids must be unique.

data.name: ROLE_PERMISSION_NOT_FOUND
data.value: One or more permissions do not exist.

data.name: ROLE_PERMISSION_NOT_GRANTED
data.value: This role does not have the permission.

data.name: ROLE_HAS_ASSIGNED_ADMINS
data.value: Role cannot be deleted because it is assigned to one or more admins.

data.name: PAGE_INVALID
data.value: Page must be greater than or equal to 1.

data.name: AUDIT_LOG_DATE_RANGE_INVALID
data.value: From date must be earlier than or equal to to date.

data.name: EVENT_TYPE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Notification event type does not exist.

data.name: TEMPLATE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Notification template does not exist.

data.name: TIER_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: A tier with this name already exists.

data.name: TIER_ID_INVALID
data.value: Tier id is invalid.

data.name: TIER_POINTS_REQUIRED_INVALID
data.value: Points required cannot be negative.

data.name: TIER_POINTS_ORDER_INVALID
data.value: Points required of a higher priority tier must be greater than points required of a lower priority tier.

data.name: TIER_PRIORITY_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: A tier with this priority already exists.

data.name: TIER_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: Tier id is required.

data.name: TIER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Tier does not exist.

data.name: VOUCHER_CODE_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: Voucher code already exists.

data.name: VOUCHER_DEFINITION_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: Voucher definition id is required.

data.name: VOUCHER_DEFINITION_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Voucher definition does not exist.

data.name: BANNER_FILE_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: Banner file must be JPEG, PNG, or WebP.

data.name: REQUEST_BODY_INVALID
data.value: Request body is invalid.

data.name: VALUE_INVALID
data.value: Request value is invalid.

data.name: ACTION_TOO_LONG
data.value: Action must be 50 characters or fewer.

data.name: BANNER_FILE_REQUIRED
data.value: Banner file is required.

data.name: BANNER_FILE_SIZE_INVALID
data.value: Banner file size exceeds the allowed limit for its type.

data.name: BANNER_UPLOAD_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: Banner type must be CAMPAIGN_BANNER or VOUCHER_DEFINITION_BANNER.

data.name: BODY_TEMPLATE_REQUIRED
data.value: Body template is required.

data.name: BODY_TEMPLATE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Body template cannot exceed 5000 characters.

data.name: CHANNEL_REQUIRED
data.value: Channel is required.

data.name: CHANNEL_TOO_LONG
data.value: Channel cannot exceed 50 characters.

data.name: EMAIL_INVALID
data.value: Email is invalid.

data.name: EMAIL_REQUIRED
data.value: Email is required.

data.name: EMAIL_TOO_LONG
data.value: Email must be 50 characters or fewer.

data.name: ENTITY_TYPE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Entity type must be 100 characters or fewer.

data.name: EVENT_TYPE_CODE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Event type code cannot exceed 50 characters.

data.name: FULL_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Full name must be 50 characters or fewer.

data.name: FULL_NAME_TOO_SHORT
data.value: Full name must be at least 2 characters.

data.name: FULL_NAME_INVALID
data.value: Full name contains invalid characters.

data.name: KEYWORD_TOO_LONG
data.value: Keyword cannot exceed 100 characters.

data.name: LANGUAGE_REQUIRED
data.value: Language is required.

data.name: LANGUAGE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Language cannot exceed 10 characters.

data.name: NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Name is required.

data.name: NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Name cannot exceed 200 characters.

data.name: NOTIFICATION_EVENT_TYPE_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: Notification event type ID is required.

data.name: PAGE_SIZE_INVALID
data.value: Page size must be between 1 and 100.

data.name: PASSWORD_REQUIRED
data.value: Password is required.

data.name: PASSWORD_TOO_LONG
data.value: Password must be {MaxLength} characters or fewer.

data.name: PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT
data.value: Password must be at least {MinLength} characters.

data.name: PERMISSION_ID_REQUIRED
data.value: Permission id is required.

data.name: PHONE_NUMBER_TOO_LONG
data.value: Phone number must be 15 characters or fewer.

data.name: PHONE_NUMBER_INVALID
data.value: Phone number must be 9 to 15 characters, contain digits only, and may start with +.

data.name: ROLE_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Role name is required.

data.name: ROLE_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Role name must be 100 characters or fewer.

data.name: ROLE_PERMISSION_IDS_REQUIRED
data.value: Permission ids are required.

data.name: SEARCH_KEYWORD_TOO_LONG
data.value: Search keyword cannot exceed 100 characters.

data.name: STATUS_INVALID
data.value: Status is invalid.

data.name: STATUS_REQUIRED
data.value: Status is required.

data.name: STATUS_TOO_LONG
data.value: Status must be 25 characters or fewer.

data.name: TIER_CYCLE_MONTH_INVALID
data.value: Cycle month must be between 1 and 12.

data.name: TIER_NAME_LENGTH_INVALID
data.value: Tier name must be between 3 and 49 characters.

data.name: TIER_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Tier name is required.

data.name: TIER_PRIORITY_INVALID
data.value: Priority must be greater than zero.

data.name: TITLE_TEMPLATE_REQUIRED
data.value: Title template is required.

data.name: TITLE_TEMPLATE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Title template cannot exceed 1000 characters.

data.name: USERNAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Username is required.

data.name: USERNAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Username must be {MaxLength} characters or fewer.

data.name: VOUCHER_CODE_MUST_BE_EMPTY
data.value: Voucher code must be empty for private vouchers.

data.name: VOUCHER_CODE_REQUIRED
data.value: Voucher code is required for public vouchers.

data.name: VOUCHER_CODE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Voucher code must not exceed 200 characters.

data.name: VOUCHER_DEFINITION_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Voucher definition name is required.

data.name: VOUCHER_DEFINITION_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Voucher definition name must not exceed 200 characters.

data.name: VOUCHER_DURATION_DAY_INVALID
data.value: Duration day must be greater than zero.

data.name: VOUCHER_DYNAMIC_DURATION_DAY_REQUIRED
data.value: Duration day is required for dynamic validity.

data.name: VOUCHER_DYNAMIC_VALID_FROM_REQUIRED
data.value: Valid from is required for dynamic validity.

data.name: VOUCHER_FIXED_VALID_FROM_REQUIRED
data.value: Valid from is required for fixed validity.

data.name: VOUCHER_FIXED_VALID_TO_REQUIRED
data.value: Valid to is required for fixed validity.

data.name: VOUCHER_GENERATION_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: Voucher generation type is invalid.

data.name: VOUCHER_GENERATION_TYPE_REQUIRED
data.value: Voucher generation type is required.

data.name: VOUCHER_PRIVATE_GENERATION_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: Private vouchers cannot use NONE generation type.

data.name: VOUCHER_PUBLIC_GENERATION_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: Public vouchers must use NONE generation type.

data.name: VOUCHER_PUBLISH_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: Voucher publish type is invalid.

data.name: VOUCHER_PUBLISH_TYPE_REQUIRED
data.value: Voucher publish type is required.

data.name: VOUCHER_REWARD_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: Voucher reward type is invalid.

data.name: VOUCHER_REWARD_TYPE_REQUIRED
data.value: Voucher reward type is required.

data.name: VOUCHER_REWARD_VALUE_MUST_BE_EMPTY
data.value: Reward value must be empty for gift vouchers.

data.name: VOUCHER_TOTAL_STOCK_INVALID
data.value: Total stock must be between 1 and 10,000,000.

data.name: VOUCHER_IMPORTED_TOTAL_STOCK_INVALID
data.value: Imported voucher total stock must be between 1 and 100,000.

data.name: VOUCHER_DEFINITION_IMPORT_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: This voucher definition cannot import voucher codes.

data.name: VOUCHER_POOL_IMPORT_ALREADY_ACTIVE
data.value: A voucher-code import is already active.

data.name: VOUCHER_POOL_ALREADY_PROVISIONED
data.value: The voucher pool has already been provisioned.

data.name: VOUCHER_POOL_IMPORT_FILE_REQUIRED
data.value: A voucher-code CSV file is required.

data.name: VOUCHER_POOL_IMPORT_FILE_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: The import file must use the .csv extension.

data.name: VOUCHER_POOL_IMPORT_FILE_SIZE_INVALID
data.value: The import file must be non-empty and no larger than 256 MiB.

data.name: VOUCHER_POOL_IMPORT_FILE_KEY_INVALID
data.value: The voucher-code import object key is invalid.

data.name: VOUCHER_VALID_FROM_NOT_FUTURE
data.value: Valid from must be in the future.

data.name: VOUCHER_VALIDITY_RANGE_INVALID
data.value: Valid to must be at least 30 minutes after valid from.

data.name: VOUCHER_VALIDITY_TYPE_INVALID
data.value: Voucher validity type is invalid.

data.name: VOUCHER_VALIDITY_TYPE_REQUIRED
data.value: Voucher validity type is required.

data.name: PERMISSION_REQUIRED
data.value: Permission is required.

data.name: PERMISSION_CODE_REQUIRED
data.value: Permission code is required.

data.name: PERMISSION_CODE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Permission code is too long.

data.name: PERMISSION_CODE_FORMAT_INVALID
data.value: Permission code can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, underscore, and dot.

data.name: PERMISSION_CODE_GROUP_INVALID
data.value: Permission code must include a valid group code.

data.name: PERMISSION_CODE_GROUP_MISMATCH
data.value: Permission code must start with its group code.

data.name: PERMISSION_CODE_NOT_DEFINED
data.value: Permission code must be defined in PermissionCodes.

data.name: PERMISSION_GROUP_CODE_REQUIRED
data.value: Permission group code is required.

data.name: PERMISSION_GROUP_CODE_TOO_LONG
data.value: Permission group code is too long.

data.name: PERMISSION_GROUP_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Permission group name is required.

data.name: PERMISSION_GROUP_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Permission group name is too long.

data.name: PERMISSION_GROUP_SORT_ORDER_INVALID
data.value: Permission group sort order must be zero or greater.

data.name: PERMISSION_ACTION_SORT_ORDER_INVALID
data.value: Permission action sort order must be zero or greater.

data.name: PERMISSION_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Permission name is required.

data.name: PERMISSION_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Permission name is too long.

data.name: TEMPLATE_NAME_REQUIRED
data.value: Template name is required.

data.name: TEMPLATE_NAME_LENGTH_INVALID
data.value: Template name must be between 3 and 255 characters.

data.name: TEMPLATE_TITLE_REQUIRED
data.value: Title template is required.

data.name: TEMPLATE_BODY_REQUIRED
data.value: Body template is required.

data.name: VOUCHER_FIXED_VALIDITY_REQUIRED
data.value: Valid from and valid to are required for fixed validity.

data.name: VOUCHER_DYNAMIC_VALIDITY_REQUIRED
data.value: Valid from and duration day are required for dynamic validity.

data.name: VOUCHER_REMAINING_STOCK_INVALID
data.value: Remaining stock must be between 0 and total stock.

data.name: VOUCHER_REWARD_VALUE_REQUIRED
data.value: Reward value is required.

data.name: VOUCHER_FIXED_REWARD_VALUE_INVALID
data.value: Fixed reward value must be greater than 0.

data.name: VOUCHER_PERCENT_REWARD_VALUE_INVALID
data.value: Percentage reward value must be between 1 and 100.

data.name: VOUCHER_BANNER_IMAGE_KEY_INVALID
data.value: Banner image key is invalid.

data.name: CUSTOMER_VOUCHER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Customer voucher does not exist.

data.name: VOUCHER_REDEMPTION_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested voucher redemption record was not found.

data.name: REDEEM_DATE_RANGE_INVALID
data.value: Redeem from date must be earlier than or equal to redeem to date.
